## ${CHECK_TYPE} Check Failed

**PR:** #${PR_NUMBER} ‚Äî ${PR_TITLE}
**Branch:** \`${HEAD_REF}\` ‚Üí \`${BASE_REF}\`
**Failed jobs:** ${FAILED_JOBS}
**Run:** ${RUN_URL}

### Steps to fix

1. Open the failed workflow run linked above
2. Expand the failing job and read the error output
3. Fix the issue in your local branch
4. Push to the PR branch to re-trigger the checks
